description_long: This object is a round pizza with a golden-brown, slightly textured crust and a square section of topping in the center, bordered by a darker, raised edge. The pizza's surface appears to be covered primarily with melted cheese, giving it a mottled orange and yellow appearance, while the border is a deep brown, suggesting a well-baked or possibly seasoned crust. The pizza is presented without any visible packaging or serving tray, and there are no clear indications of individual slices or cut lines. The overall shape is very regular and symmetrical, with the square topping area contrasting against the circular form of the pizza. The crust is thick and prominent, giving the pizza a robust, hearty look. No brand logos or additional toppings such as pepperoni or vegetables are visible.
description: A round pizza with a thick, dark brown crust and a square section of cheese topping in the center. The surface is golden-orange with a pronounced, well-baked border.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pizza from above, highlighting the square cheese topping and thick, dark crust border.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the pizza's thickness and the raised, dark brown crust, with the square topping visible on the surface.
description_view_2: Direct top-down view emphasizes the symmetrical, circular shape and the contrast between the square topping and the round crust.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the pizza's thickness and the square topping, mirroring view 1.
